gitCommit.subject: chore(deps-dev): bump monocart-reporter in the reporting group (#24)
gitCommit.body:
chore(deps-dev): bump monocart-reporter in the reporting group (#24)

Bumps the reporting group with 1 update: [monocart-reporter](https://github.com/cenfun/monocart-reporter).


Updates `monocart-reporter` from 1.6.36 to 2.12.0
- [Release notes](https://github.com/cenfun/monocart-reporter/releases)
- [Changelog](https://github.com/cenfun/monocart-reporter/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md)
- [Commits](https://github.com/cenfun/monocart-reporter/compare/1.6.36...2.12.0)

---
updated-dependencies:
- dependency-name: monocart-reporter
  dependency-version: 2.12.0
  dependency-type: direct:development
  update-type: version-update:semver-major
  dependency-group: reporting
...

Signed-off-by: dependabot[bot] <support@github.com>
Co-authored-by: dependabot[bot] <49699333+dependabot[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

subs.title: standard user can log in and land on inventory @smoke @ui @auth
locked out user sees a clear login error @ui @auth @negative
unauthenticated user cannot deep-link into inventory @ui @auth @negative @session
user can add and remove an item from the cart @smoke @ui @cart
Click locator('[data-test="inventory-item"]').filter({ hasText: 'Sauce Labs Backpack' }).getByRole('button', { name: 'Add to cart' })
Click locator('[data-test="cart-list"] [data-test="inventory-item"]').filter({ hasText: 'Sauce Labs Backpack' }).getByRole('button', { name: 'Remove' })
user can complete checkout for selected products @smoke @ui @checkout
Click locator('[data-test="inventory-item"]').filter({ hasText: 'Sauce Labs Backpack' }).getByRole('button', { name: 'Add to cart' })
Click locator('[data-test="inventory-item"]').filter({ hasText: 'Sauce Labs Bike Light' }).getByRole('button', { name: 'Add to cart' })
Click locator('[data-test="inventory-item"]').filter({ hasText: 'Sauce Labs Backpack' }).getByRole('button', { name: 'Add to cart' })
Click locator('[data-test="inventory-item"]').filter({ hasText: 'Sauce Labs Backpack' }).getByRole('button', { name: 'Add to cart' })
Click locator('[data-test="inventory-item"]').filter({ hasText: 'Sauce Labs Backpack' }).getByRole('button', { name: 'Add to cart' })
user can sort products by price from low to high @ui @catalog
